title: SD enforces gig worker business license
description: Rideshare and taxi drivers now required to obtain city business tax certificates

title: SD Minimum Wage Enforcement Fee takes effect
description: New $1.47/employee annual fee triggers wave of business registrations across construction, professional services

title: SD Short-Term Rental (STRO) enforcement begins
description: City begins enforcing STRO license requirement, removing thousands of illegal Airbnb listings. STR registrations jump from ~2/month to 14-23/month

title: California fully reopens post-COVID
description: State lifts all COVID capacity and distancing restrictions, triggering accelerated business registrations across all sectors

title: Post-pandemic entrepreneurship boom hits SD
description: Great Resignation and record stimulus savings drive new business applications nationally to 5M+. SD registrations jump 22% year-over-year

title: California AB5 gig worker law takes effect
description: ABC test for independent contractor classification becomes law, affecting gig workers statewide

title: California recreational cannabis sales begin
description: Prop 64 takes effect. San Diego leads state with first recreational cannabis retail licenses issued Dec 2017

title: SD ramps up sidewalk vendor permit enforcement
description: City enforcement of sidewalk vending permits intensifies, registrations surge from ~6/month to 34/month by October
